nasb.text: Therefore beseech the Lord of the harvest to send out workers into His harvest.”

esv.text: therefore pray earnestly to the Lord of the harvest to send out laborers into his harvest.”

cnv.text: 所以你們應當求莊稼的主派工人去收割他的莊稼。”

ccb.text: 因此，你们要祈求庄稼的主人派更多的工人去收割。”

csbs.text: 所以你们要祈求收割的主催促工人参与他的收割工作。”
